slides.title: Calm the *quiet fire* behind aging.
slides.sub: Chronic low-grade inflammation, sometimes called inflammaging, is linked to many age-related diseases. You can cool it.

slides.title: Meet inflammaging
slides.body: Chronic low-grade inflammation, sometimes called inflammaging, *is linked to* many of the diseases of aging.

slides.title: What fuels the fire
slides.body: Poor sleep, ultra-processed food, inactivity and belly fat *tend to feed it*, keeping the body quietly on alert.

slides.title: How to cool it
slides.body: Colorful plants, omega-3s, movement and sleep *may help calm it*, the same basics that support whole-body health.

slides.title: The common thread
slides.body: Inflammation is *the thread* running through most longevity levers, so calming it tends to help across the board.

slides.title: Small choices, lower baseline
slides.body: No single fix matters most. *Small daily choices* add up to a lower baseline over months and years.

slides.title: Lower the baseline, *one day at a time*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one calm daily score and a simple plan for tomorrow.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
There's a quiet fire behind a lot of aging. Chronic low-grade inflammation, sometimes called inflammaging, is linked to many age-related diseases. 🔥

It's fueled by poor sleep, ultra-processed food, inactivity and belly fat, and calmed by colorful plants, omega-3s, movement and sleep. It's the common thread, so small daily choices lower your baseline. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those choices into one calm score and a plan for tomorrow → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Calm the Inflammation Behind Aging
